findings.title: Avoid copying the formatted request message for every access log
findings.impact: Each emitted access log now calls FormatAccessReqMsg(), which returns a std::string before appending it to logStream. In the common non-sampled-marker case that helper returns reqMsg by value, adding another allocation/copy of the already formatted request payload on every foreground client/worker access-log path.
findings.fix: Change the helper back to an append-style API, for example AppendReqMsgWithSampleMark(std::ostream&, AccessKeyType, const std::string&), so the existing reqMsg is streamed directly and the sampled marker is appended without materializing a second full request-message string.
